EcoLawns Denver
HomeServicesAbout

Services & Pricing

Professional, eco-friendly lawn care in Denver. All equipment is electric—quiet and emission-free on your property—with batteries charged in part from home solar and portable power on site. Request a quote on any service below.

Lawn Mowing Pricing

Season Pass

Save 25%

Two payments cover 14 bi-weekly visits (every 2 weeks, April–October, ~28 weeks). Additional cuts at your discounted rate (25% off).

14 bi-weekly visits included
25% discount on all visits
Additional cuts at discounted rate
Lock in your rate for the season

Standard cost for most south-metro lawns: ~$300-350 per payment (2 payments)

Pay Per Visit

Pay only for each visit. Weekly or bi-weekly service available—you're charged per mow with no season bundle.

Flexible scheduling
No commitment required
Pay as you go

Standard cost for most south-metro lawns: ~$50-60 per visit

We'll contact you with specific pricing based on your property size and needs. The costs above represent standard pricing for most properties we serve around south Denver and nearby suburbs. Final pricing will be provided after we review your address.

Extra mowing visits beyond your usual schedule: Season Pass customers get 25% off those cuts; pay-per-visit customers pay the standard per-visit rate.

Payment Options

All payments can be made digitally or collected at the time of service. Payments are considered late 24 hours after service completion.

Our Services

What we offer and ballpark pricing. Request a quote on any service—we'll confirm details for your address.

Weekly & Bi-Weekly Lawn Mowing

Professional mowing with quiet, battery-powered electric equipment—edging, trim, and clippings cleanup included.

Use the season pass and pay-per-visit rates in the section above.

Spring Cleanup & Aeration

Cleanup, dethatching, core aeration, and overseeding to kick off the growing season—all electric.

Typical range: ~$150–200 for most south-metro lawns (quote confirms for your property).

Snow Removal Service

Driveways, walkways, and sidewalks—electric equipment, quiet and reliable. Book ad hoc as needed.

Custom pricing from driveway length and lot layout.

Fall Cleanup & Winter Prep

Leaf and debris removal, winter fertilizer, and prep for cold months—all electric.

Typical range: ~$150–200 for most south-metro lawns (quote confirms for your property).

Book Denver lawn care

Prefer the full pricing wizard? Use the home page quote tool. Serving Littleton, Englewood, Harvey Park, Bear Valley, and nearby— see neighborhoods.

Instant quote on homeRequest a quote on a service
